description: Originally launched on Ethereum in Q2 2017, Basic Attention Token (BAT) powers advertising on its blockchain-based digital advertising platform. Now as a 1:1 price-indexing token on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 BAT gives original BAT holders, users and traders instant finality, ultra-low fees, and AI contract capability for faster, more secure, and more scalable use worldwide.
name: Basic Attention Token
